name: Wand of the Snowfields (7th-Rank Spell)
description:
This wand is a slender length of ice-blue glass.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast Howling Blizzard at 7th-rank. Snow lingers in the spell's area, remaining as difficult terrain for 1 minute.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of howling blizzard at 7th-rank.
